name: onboarding
description: Codebase onboarding: generate architecture overview, setup guide, and key concepts walkthrough

parameters.name: repo_path
parameters.description: Path to the repository to analyze

team.name: explorer
team.role: Codebase archaeologist — explores and maps unfamiliar codebases systematically

tasks.title: Map codebase structure
tasks.description:
Explore {{repo_path}} and create a comprehensive codebase map:

1. Project structure overview (directories, key files, entry points)
2. Tech stack (languages, frameworks, build tools, dependencies)
3. Architecture diagram (high-level components and data flow)
4. Key abstractions and patterns used
5. Configuration files and their purpose

Write to onboarding/01-architecture.md. Target audience: {{audience}}.

tasks.title: Create development setup guide
tasks.description:
Based on {{repo_path}}, create a step-by-step development setup guide:

1. Prerequisites (runtime, tools, accounts)
2. Installation steps
3. Configuration (env vars, config files)
4. How to run the project locally
5. How to run tests
6. Common development tasks
7. Troubleshooting common issues

Write to onboarding/02-setup-guide.md. Target audience: {{audience}}.

tasks.title: Document key concepts and flows
tasks.description:
Document the most important concepts and data flows in {{repo_path}}:

1. Core domain concepts and terminology
2. Main user flows (trace through the code)
3. Data model and state management
4. API surface (if applicable)
5. Extension points and customization
6. Where to start reading the code

Write to onboarding/03-key-concepts.md. Target audience: {{audience}}.

expectations.criteria: Onboarding documentation is accurate, well-structured, provides clear starting points, and would genuinely help a new team member get productive quickly
